creator: freebsd@q-stall.org
text:
The port of databases/rocksdb hasn't been updated in a while and is still on version 3.2.1 while the lastest version of rocksdb is at 3.6.1.

There are quite a few new databases like InfluxDB out there which depend on RocksDB. InfluxDB for instance requires at least v3.5.1 since its latest release.

Would be happy if someone could look into this.
